name: Lords & Blades
short_description: Embark on an epic journey in the mystical realm of Eswaydan, a breathtaking valley nestled within the majestic Thuyr Kingdom. Surrounded by towering, snow-capped peaks, Eswaydan is a land shrouded in mystery and magic. Fight your way through hordes of undead and demons, and free Eswaydan of Evil!
detailed_description:
Uncover a Dark Mystery in a World of Magic and Danger!

Dive into the enchanting yet perilous realm of Eswaydan, a valley steeped in mystery and magic, nestled within the cold, majestic peaks of the Thuyr Kingdom. But beware—Eswaydan is cursed. Every five years, a lone hero is summoned from the legendary Hillside Hut to confront the dark forces that threaten to engulf the valley.

Will you be the one to break the cycle and save Eswaydan?

  • 🌟 Engage in an epic RPG adventure filled with rich storytelling and deep, meaningful choices.

  • 🔍 Explore a breathtaking world—from icy mountains to ancient ruins—and uncover the secrets of Eswaydan’s curse.

  • 🤝 Embark on epic quests or explore the world on your terms.

The fate of Eswaydan is in your hands. Will you rise to the challenge, or will the valley succumb to eternal darkness?

Your adventure begins now.

KEY FEATURES

* A deep and dark story to uncover.

* Fun and difficult combat that emphasizes on blocking and evading attacks or attack your enemies from afar with a wide varieties of bow & arrow combos.

* A beautifull and vast snowy world that is completely open world!

* RPG elements with questing, leveing and character customization!

Wishlisting is the best and easiest way to help our indie game succeed!

@Sentinelstudios on Instagram & Reddit!
